svg.title: MedLynq database schema
svg.text: Multi-tenant by hospital_id. PK = primary key (bold). FK = foreign key (orange, with dashed arrows). Columns are not exhaustive — only what matters.

g.text: Every other table joins to this.

svg.text: Query loop — classify, locate, draft, packet

g.text: hospitals → users · patients · folders · subscriptions · empanelment · audit_events · folders → documents · case_sheets · vitals · checklist · preauth · claims · share_links
